contact.name: Grace Douglas
contact.notes: Phone three to four times a week. Sunday dinners at the Pearl City house.

contact.name: Kai Douglas
contact.notes: Apprentice plumber, lives with Grace. Daily memes by text.

contact.name: Maya Leong
contact.notes: Pediatric nurse. Saturday morning Kailua beach walks.

contact.name: Justin Ota
contact.notes: Physical therapist. Mon Wed Fri runs at Kapiolani Park, 5:30 AM.

contact.name: Dr. Elaine Park
contact.notes: Lead OT and clinical mentor. Weekly 1:1 Thursdays 4:00 PM.

contact.name: Fumiko Douglas
contact.notes: Visit every other Sunday. Lives with Uncle Tad.

contact.name: Tad Douglas
contact.notes: Day to day check on Fumiko.

contact.name: Dr. Lani Akana
contact.notes: Manages Hashimoto's thyroiditis. TSH every six months.

contact.name: Dr. Wayne Ching
contact.notes: Twice a year. Last visit February 2026.

contact.name: Dr. Megan Souza
contact.notes: Annual vision exam. Last visit October 2025.
